rationale: Positive test for the skills/_data workaround. plugin.json with skills: ['skills/_data'] and a SKILL.md frontmatter declaring 'trigger: never' must (a) install cleanly, (b) leave the SKILL.md on disk, and (c) NEVER route on any prompt — even an adversarially compound 'list types, start discover, write an ADR'. T13 forks the architecture into two paths; this is the on-path test for the documented fallback.
